pages.name: GM Guide moved to the wiki

text.content:
The full GM Guide for Substances and Paraphernalia lives on the GitHub wiki. The wiki updates between module releases, so it stays current with the latest mechanics, authoring guidance, and troubleshooting notes.

Wiki home

https://github.com/themrbeasley/substances-and-paraphernalia/wiki

What's covered

  • Mechanics overview — the consumption gate, addiction loop, withdrawal, tolerance, and overdose.
  • Authoring — the Details-tab fields, the AE name contracts (addict, withdraw, tolerance, overdose), the modifier flag block on bypass / tolerance AEs, the overdose flag.
  • Save bypass tiers — auto-pass > advantage > +N, with worked examples.
  • Voluntary abstain — the long-rest dialog button and the math behind it.
  • Poisoned coupling modes — linked-cascade, linked-isolated, independent.
  • Paraphernalia Subtype Manager — adding custom subtypes that authors can pick from.
  • Simulate-dose tool — using the 3-dot menu entry on substance items to dry-run a dose.
  • Macros — Remove Addiction, Remove Altered, Remove Overdose, Remove Tolerance, Remove Withdrawal, Toggle Paraphernalia Enforcement.

Issues and feedback

Report bugs and request features on the issue tracker.
